title: jiff Integration
summary: Goal: Expose the jiff datetime crate to R via a new jiff optional feature in miniextendr-api. Branch: feat/jiff-integration Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-22-jiff-integration-design.md Review: reviews/2026-04-22-jiff-integration.md

title: cargo-revendor test matrix
summary: Gap analysis vs the existing 23 integration tests in cargo-revendor/tests/integration.rs, plus a harness proposal for elaborate multi-workspace scenarios.

title: Plan: Full DataFusion integration (SQL + DataFrame API)
summary: Extend the current thin datafusion feature (RSessionContext with block_on) into a complete query interface: register R data, run SQL, use DataFrame API, read/write files.

title: Plan: Create `tools/detect-features.R` for configure-time feature detection
summary: rpkg/configure.ac references tools/detect-features.R for auto-detecting which cargo features to enable, but the file doesn't exist. Currently falls back to a hardcoded list of all features. Create the script so scaffolded packages can auto-detect available features.

title: Plan: `to_dataframe_split` for enum `DataFrameRow`
summary: Add {EnumName}::todataframesplit(rows: Vec<Self>) -> List as a generated method for every enum that derives DataFrameRow. It partitions the row vector by variant and returns one data.frame per variant:

title: Plan: Extract Optional Integrations into `miniextendr-*` Crates (No Cycles)
summary: Move optional integration logic out of miniextendr-api into dedicated crates while keeping miniextendr-api as the user-facing R boundary.

title: Plan: Fix class-system-matrix test failures (13 remaining)
summary: Types with #[miniextendr] (Env) inherent impl + different-class-system trait impl don't get $.ClassName generated. The $ dispatch method is only generated when the inherent impl codegen runs for env-class — but the class-system-matrix types split inherent and trait impls across different class systems.

title: Flat local-crate vendor paths (hybrid layout)
summary: Issue #284. Option 2: cargo-revendor --freeze writes flat vendor/<name>/ paths for local workspace crates (miniextendr-api, miniextendr-macros, miniextendr-lint, etc.) while keeping cargo vendor --versioned-dirs for transitive deps. minirextendr already expects this layout on both the read and write side — only cargo-revendor drifted.

title: Plan: `Lazy<T>` — Opt-in ALTREP lazy materialization for all conversion types
summary: Introduce Lazy<T> as an opt-in wrapper that returns Rust data to R as ALTREP vectors instead of copying. R reads elements on demand; full materialization only happens if R needs a contiguous pointer (e.g., for .Internal(inspect(x))).

title: Git LFS History Cleanup
summary: Remove all historical copies of vendor.tar.xz from git objects across all branches. Currently 54 versions totaling ~408 MB bloat the repo.

title: Plan: Builder-First Parallel Column Chunks for DataFrames
summary: Replace a closure-only API with a builder-style API that feels like itertools and Rayon:

title: Plan: Scope-as-Allocator (Protected-by-Construction)
summary: Builds on unified-gc-protection.md. That plan adds Protector trait + pool. This plan changes the API surface: instead of allocate-then-protect, the scope IS the allocator.

title: Plan: Vendor Examples as R Test Fixtures
summary: Implement upstream crate examples as R test fixtures in rpkg, organized by optional integration crate. Each item is a new Rust #[miniextendr] function in the corresponding rpkg/src/rust/*adaptertests.rs file, plus an R test in rpkg/tests/testthat/.

title: Vendor only inside R CMD build → R CMD INSTALL <tarball>
summary: Vendoring (rpkg/vendor/ + rpkg/inst/vendor.tar.xz) becomes a CRAN-tarball-only artifact.

title: Plan: docs/VISIBILITY.md
summary: Create a dedicated reference doc covering how Rust visibility and #[miniextendr] export attributes control what ends up in R's NAMESPACE vs what is only callable internally.
